predictive-maintenance.recommendedAction: Schedule emergency docking for bearing replacement at PT United Shipyard Tanjung Priok
Replace turbocharger cartridge during current Constanta Shipyard drydock
Order spare seals and plan replacement during next discharge at Trieste

predictive-maintenance.component: Ballast Water UV Reactor (Alfa Laval PureBallast)
predictive-maintenance.recommendedAction: Replace UV lamp assembly during scheduled BWTS maintenance at Constanta
Conduct ultrasonic thickness measurement during next port stay at Qingdao
Replace hydraulic pump seal kit during next scheduled Constanta port call

compliance-certificates.certificateType: Energy Efficiency Management Plan (SEEMP Part III)

port-state-deficiencies.description: Fire detection system — smoke detector in engine room No. 2 zone inoperative. Non-compliance with SOLAS Ch. II-2/Reg. 7.2.2.
MARPOL Annex I — oil water separator discharge exceeding 15 ppm limit. Sample analysis showed 22 ppm. OWS alarm not functioning.
Lifesaving appliances — lifeboat on-load release mechanism requires servicing per MSC.1/Circ.1206/Rev.2. Annual maintenance record incomplete.
MLC 2006 — crew rest hour records incomplete for Chief Officer and 2nd Engineer. Work/rest analysis shows potential non-compliance with Standard A2.3.
Navigation equipment — ECDIS backup arrangement not compliant with SOLAS Ch. V/Reg. 19.2.1.4. Backup ECDIS showing chart datum error.
Structural safety — wastage found on main deck plating exceeding 20% of original thickness. Class condition noted by Romanian Naval Authority.

ai-briefings.title: Black Sea Fleet CII Performance Analysis
ai-briefings.summary: Black Sea Division fleet-wide CII trending 8% above required thresholds. TORM HELLAS rated D and OLDENDORFF BRISBANE at C boundary — both at risk of operational restrictions under IMO MEPC.352(78) 2026 tightening.
ai-briefings.details: 9-month emission data analysis per MARPOL Annex VI Regulation 28 shows attained CII deterioration across 4 vessels. Primary contributors: TORM HELLAS (attained 9.82 vs required 6.88) and OLDENDORFF BRISBANE (4.52 vs 4.10). Hull fouling penalty estimated at 12-15% fuel increase. Constanta Shipyard drydock capacity available Q2 2026. Wind-assisted propulsion (Norsepower Rotor Sail) retrofit estimated ROI: 18 months.
actionItems: Submit CII Corrective Action Plan to flag state per MEPC.355(78) by June 2026
Schedule hull cleaning for TORM HELLAS at Constanta Shipyard during current drydock
Implement JIT arrival optimization for Bosporus transit to reduce idle time emissions
Evaluate Norsepower Rotor Sail retrofit for OLDENDORFF BRISBANE (est. 8% fuel saving)

ai-briefings.title: Bosporus Strait Congestion — Route Optimization Required
ai-briefings.summary: Turkish Straits VTS reporting 72-hour northbound transit delays. 23 vessels queued at southern anchorage. CMA CGM BOSPHORUS anchored since March 26. Revenue loss estimated at $45,000/day for detained fleet.
ai-briefings.details: Kıyı Emniyeti (Turkish Coastal Safety) data shows abnormal congestion due to combined factors: (1) Russian grain export surge, (2) seasonal LPG traffic increase from Ceyhan, (3) maintenance at İstanbul Strait radar station. Historical analysis suggests congestion will persist 5-7 days. Alternative routing via Suez Canal adds 4 days but avoids $180K demurrage exposure. JIT arrival coordination with Constanta Port Authority recommended.
actionItems: Coordinate JIT arrival with Constanta Port Authority (APMC) for STENA POLARIS
Request priority transit slot for CMA CGM BOSPHORUS via agent (Marline Agency Istanbul)
Evaluate Suez Canal alternative for non-time-critical Black Sea cargoes
Brief commercial team on potential 5-7 day delay impact on Q1 performance

ai-briefings.title: EU ETS Maritime Compliance — Q1 Allowance Deadline
ai-briefings.summary: EU ETS maritime phase-in requires 40% of 2026 emissions covered by allowances. Submission deadline April 30. 8 vessels in fleet have EU port calls requiring reporting under Regulation 2023/959.
ai-briefings.details: Under EU ETS Directive 2003/87/EC as amended by 2023/959, maritime emissions for voyages to/from EU ports must be covered. Fleet exposure: estimated 42,000 EU Allowances (EUAs) at current price €85/EUA = €3.57M obligation. Vessels affected: MAERSK EDINBURGH, EURONAV DANUBE, MINERVA SOPHIA, CMA CGM BOSPHORUS, MSC AURORA, TORM HELLAS, CONSTANTA SPIRIT, DANUBIA STAR. MRV data from Thetis-MRV must reconcile with ETS reporting.
actionItems: Verify EU MRV emissions data in Thetis-MRV for all 8 vessels with EU port calls
Purchase 42,000 EUAs before April 30 deadline at current spot price
Implement FuelEU Maritime preparedness for 2025 well-to-wake intensity targets
Update voyage P&L models to include EU ETS cost per voyage for commercial team

ai-briefings.title: Predictive Maintenance Alert — PACIFIC BASIN TIANJIN Stern Tube
ai-briefings.summary: ML vibration analysis predicts 73% probability of stern tube bearing failure within 45 days. ClassNK Rule Part C 5.2 requires docking survey. Tanjung Priok offers lowest-cost repair window.
ai-briefings.details: SKF Copperhead vibration monitoring trend: propeller shaft 2x RPM harmonic increasing at 0.3 mm/s per week (current: 4.2 mm/s, ClassNK limit: 4.5 mm/s). Pattern matches pre-failure signature from fleet database (87% match to PACIFIC BASIN WUHAN failure 2024). Stern tube oil consumption: 1.2L/day (normal: 0.3L/day). PT United Shipyard Tanjung Priok quoted $95K for emergency docking incl. bearing replacement. Lead time for Wartsila lip seal assembly: 14 days.
actionItems: Schedule emergency docking at PT United Shipyard Tanjung Priok (earliest slot: April 8)
Order replacement Wartsila lip seal assembly — DDP Jakarta (14-day lead)
Prepare ClassNK surveyor request for tail shaft survey per Rule Part C 5.2

event-logs.message: Main engine cylinder 3 exhaust gas temperature exceeding safe limits — MAN B&W 6S50ME-C
event-logs.details: Exhaust gas temperature reading 520°C, normal range 380-450°C. Scavenge air pressure drop detected. Auto-shutdown protocol per SMS Section 8.4.2 initiated. Constanta Shipyard maintenance team mobilized.

event-logs.message: Scrubber wash water pH below IMO MEPC.259(68) threshold
event-logs.details: pH reading 5.8, minimum threshold 6.0. Open loop scrubber wash water exceeding PAH limits. Approaching EU ECA where open loop operation is restricted. Auto-switching to closed loop mode.

event-logs.message: Vessel entered US EEZ boundary — USCG reporting requirements active
event-logs.details: Position: 34.05°N, 152.30°W. Speed: 19.8 knots. Heading: 275°. 96-hour advance notice of arrival submitted to NVMC. ISPS Security Level 1 confirmed.

event-logs.message: Cargo tank ullage levels verified — all 14 cargo tanks within parameters
event-logs.details: Total cargo volume: 148,500 m³ Bonny Light crude (API 33.4°). Tank atmosphere: O2 <8%, HC <1% LEL. Crude oil washing completed on tanks 1P/1S per MARPOL Annex I COW requirements.

event-logs.message: Bosporus Strait transit delay — strong southerly current advisory
event-logs.details: Turkish Maritime Authority (Kıyı Emniyeti) reporting 4-6 knot southerly current in strait. Vessel Traffic Service (TÜDAV) advising convoys delayed 8-12 hours. Next northbound slot: 2026-03-27 0600 LT.
event-logs.source: Turkish Straits VTS / Navtex Station Istanbul

event-logs.message: Vessel transiting UKMTO Voluntary Reporting Area — Strait of Hormuz
event-logs.details: BMP5 procedures activated per UKMTO reporting. SSAS armed and tested. Citadel readiness confirmed. AIS transmitting on full power. Speed maintained above 12 knots. Iranian Revolutionary Guard vessels observed 8nm south.

event-logs.message: Noon report submitted — CII performance on target for A rating
event-logs.details: HFO: 190 MT, MGO: 15 MT. Average speed: 21.2 knots. Slip: 2.1%. Weather factor: 1.05. Attained CII: 3.12 gCO2/DWT·nm (required boundary: 4.85). Running on dual-fuel LNG.

event-logs.message: Propeller shaft vibration levels approaching ClassNK threshold
event-logs.details: Vibration reading: 4.2 mm/s velocity (ClassNK threshold: 4.5 mm/s). Bearing temperature: 62°C. Harmonic analysis shows 2x RPM frequency increasing at 0.3 mm/s/week. Stern tube oil consumption elevated.

event-logs.message: Ballast water exchange completed per D-1 standard
event-logs.details: Tanks 1-6 sequential exchange in open ocean (>200nm from shore, depth >200m per BWMC Reg. B-3.1). Volume: 42,000 m³. Post-exchange salinity: 35.2 PSU (>30 PSU required). Samples retained.

event-logs.message: MARPOL Annex VI IAPP Certificate expiring in 4 days
event-logs.details: Certificate expires 2026-03-30. Flag State (Greece) notified. Lloyd's Register Class surveyor available at Trieste for renewal survey. IAPP renewal requires NOx Technical File verification and EIAPP engine certification.

event-logs.message: Vessel anchored at Bosporus approach — awaiting northbound transit slot
event-logs.details: Anchored at position 41°10.5'N, 029°04.8'E (Bosporus southern anchorage). Current queue: 18 vessels northbound. Turkish Straits VTS assigned Slot #14. Estimated transit: 2026-03-28 1400 LT.

event-logs.message: Exiting Northern Sea Route — entering Norwegian sector Barents Sea
event-logs.details: Position: 68°57'N, 033°03'E. Ice class Arc7 hull performing nominally. NSR Administration transit permit fulfilled. No ice damage observed. Murmansk pilot disembarked.
event-logs.source: NSR Administration / Rosatom Ice Pilot Service

event-logs.message: Enclosed space entry permit expired during drydock maintenance
event-logs.details: Permit for engine room lower platform expired at 12:00. Last atmosphere test at 09:00: O2: 20.8%, HC: 0% LEL, H2S: 0 ppm, CO: 2 ppm. All personnel evacuated per SMS Section 12.3 and MSC.1/Circ.1401.

event-logs.message: Inmarsat Fleet Xpress bandwidth optimized
event-logs.details: VSAT link stabilized at 6 Mbps download / 2 Mbps upload via Inmarsat GX Ka-band. Latency: 580ms. Backup: Iridium Certus L-band. Crew welfare bandwidth allocation: 40%.

event-logs.message: Continuous Emission Monitoring — within IMO 2020 sulphur limits
event-logs.details: SOx: 0.42% m/m (IMO 2020 limit: 0.50%). NOx: 12.4 g/kWh (Tier II compliant, 14.4 limit). PM: 0.08 g/kWh. Running on 0.5% VLSFO (ISO 8217:2017 compliant). EU MRV data auto-reported.

event-logs.message: Hold #3 bilge alarm activated — monitoring during Black Sea transit
event-logs.details: Water ingress detected in cargo hold #3 (grain cargo). Bilge well level: 0.35m. Sounding pipe readings stable. Bilge pump started — 2.5 m³/hr discharge. Hatch cover watertight integrity check ordered.

event-logs.message: Berth allocation confirmed at Constanta South Agigea
event-logs.details: Berth 80, Constanta South Container Terminal (CSCT). ETA: March 28, 0800 LT. Pilot boarding at Constanta fairway buoy (43°59.5'N, 028°40.5'E). Tugs: 2x Svitzer required.

event-logs.message: Entering Sulina Channel — Danube Maritime Administration pilot boarded
event-logs.details: Sulina Branch channel entry. Draft: 4.3m (max permitted 5.8m). Speed limit: 6 knots in channel. Romanian Danube Administration (AFDJ) pilot embarked. Expected Constanta arrival: March 28.

event-logs.message: Crew change completed at Ningbo per MLC 2006 requirements
event-logs.details: 12 crew signed off (max 11-month contracts per MLC Standard A2.5.1), 12 signed on. All STCW certificates verified. Covid and Yellow Fever vaccination certificates valid. Seafarer Employment Agreements filed.

event-logs.message: Annual class survey overdue — vessel subject to Paris MOU detention risk
event-logs.details: Annual class survey was due 2026-03-15 per Lloyd's Register rules. Survey outstanding. Class notation suspended conditionally. If not completed by 2026-04-15, vessel will be placed on Condition of Class. High detention priority at next PSC inspection.
event-logs.source: Lloyd's Register ClassDirect / Paris MOU THETIS Database

fleets.name: Black Sea & Med Division
fleets.description: Constanta-based operations covering Black Sea, Bosporus transit, and Eastern Mediterranean trade lanes including Danube river feeder services.

fleets.name: Trans-Pacific Fleet
fleets.description: Major container and bulk carrier operations on Asia-North America routes via great circle and southern routing.

fleets.name: Atlantic Tanker Group
fleets.description: VLCC and Suezmax tanker operations on WAF-USEC, Caribbean, and transatlantic crude/product routes.

fleets.name: Arabian Gulf & Indian Ocean
fleets.description: Middle East petroleum logistics covering AG loading ports, Suez Canal transit, and Indian subcontinent discharge.

maintenance-logs.description: Complete cylinder liner replacement and piston ring renewal. Exhaust gas temperature 520°C exceeding 450°C limit. Crosshead bearing inspection required per maker's instruction MI-3.2.1.

maintenance-logs.component: Ballast Water Treatment System (Alfa Laval PureBallast 3)
maintenance-logs.description: UV reactor chamber replacement — failing to meet IMO D-2 discharge standard (max 10 viable organisms/m³). Required before next PSC inspection per BWMC Regulation B-3.
Anti-fouling paint application due. Underwater ROV inspection shows 25% biofouling coverage, adding estimated 12% fuel penalty. CII rating at risk of downgrade from C to D.
6,000-hour service interval. Fuel injector overhaul, turbocharger cartridge inspection per W20 maintenance manual. Lube oil sampling indicates elevated iron content (85 ppm vs 45 ppm normal).
Hydraulic hose replacement and SWL 45t load test certification renewal per SOLAS Ch. VI/Reg. 7. Class surveyor attended.
Vibration analysis shows 4.2 mm/s velocity (threshold 4.5). Harmonic frequency at 2x RPM increasing. Docking required for tail shaft survey per ClassNK Rule Part C 5.2.
Routine pump performance test per OCIMF SIRE Chapter 9. Discharge rate verified at 3,000 m³/hr. Mechanical seal inspection satisfactory.
Annual radar performance check and ARPA calibration per SOLAS Ch. V/Reg. 19. ECDIS backup arrangement verification included. IMO Performance Standard MSC.192(79) compliance.

maintenance-logs.component: Exhaust Gas Cleaning System (Wärtsilä Open Loop Scrubber)
maintenance-logs.description: Wash water pH sensor replacement and effluent monitoring calibration. Must meet IMO MEPC.259(68) discharge criteria before entering EU ECA.
Annual steering gear test per SOLAS Ch. V/Reg. 26. Hydraulic system pressure test at 1.25x working pressure. Emergency steering changeover drill conducted in 28 seconds (requirement: <60s).
Steam drum tube leak repair — water side corrosion identified during internal inspection. Tube plugging of 3 damaged tubes. Hydrostatic test required at 1.5x MAWP before return to service.

maintenance-logs.component: Reefer Container Power Supply (2,200 TEU reefer capacity)
maintenance-logs.description: Inspection of reefer power supply connections and Emerson/Carrier Lynx monitoring system across tier 5-9. Thermal imaging of bus bars for hotspot detection.
